name: Rep. Emanuel Cleaver
tweet: Fighting #ClimateChange is not just the moral thing to do, but also the wise thing to do to secure the financial futures of hard-working Americans. Now, let’s get to work on getting the #RESPONDAct passed into law!

name: Rep. Emanuel Cleaver
tweet: The data we’ve seen to date is clear: #ClimateChange poses a massive risk to our economy, & this bill will ensure the retirement benefits of millions of federal workers are protected from those risks.

name: Rep. Emanuel Cleaver
tweet: The more we examine how #ClimateChange impacts our financial system, the better we can protect the livelihoods of  our nation’s valuable workforce, while incentivizing corporations to quickly transition to renewable energy sources.

name: Rep. Emanuel Cleaver
tweet: Should these studies determine pensions would yield greater results if they implement low-carbon investment strategies, then the Federal Retirement Thrift Investment Board would immediately be directed to transition their investment practices accordingly.

name: Rep. Emanuel Cleaver
tweet: The #RESPONDAct would establish the necessary resources to analyze the adverse effects of #ClimateChange on the economy and require annual reports projecting and accounting for these costs, including how they impact the pensions of federal workers.

name: Rep. Emanuel Cleaver
tweet: As the world continues to transition away from fossil fuels to protect future generations, it’s important that federal retirees aren’t set up to fail with retirement portfolios heavily invested in the fossil fuel industry.

name: Rep. Emanuel Cleaver
tweet: With the #RESPONDAct, @RepRashida and I are calling on financial regulators to examine the economic costs of #ClimateChange and utilize the data to make sound investments on behalf of more than 5.5 million federal employees.

name: Rep. Emanuel Cleaver
tweet: I am proud to work with @RepRashida to introduce the #RESPONDAct, legislation that would protect federal pensions from the economic impacts of #ClimateChange.  https://t.co/8FA3co7p3q

tweet: This is not a game, it is the law. #CBCTech2020

name: Rep. Emanuel Cleaver
tweet: It's alarming how many companies secure gov't contracts w/o any checks/balances on diversity efforts, plans, & supporting data. #CBCTech2020

name: Rep. Emanuel Cleaver
tweet: We urge @USDOL to require gov't contracted tech companies to abide by fed regulations: develop written affirmative action plans #CBCTech2020

name: Rep. Emanuel Cleaver
tweet: As of 2014, the % of African-Americans who work for tech companies whom hold sizable government contracts, was only 4.3%. #CBCTech2020

name: Rep. Emanuel Cleaver
tweet: However, minorities hired by some of the largest tech companies in Silicon Valley are virtually non-existent. #CBCTech2020

name: Rep. Emanuel Cleaver
tweet: According to @EdNCES, in 2012-2013 about 6,000 US African- American students earned computer & information science degrees. #CBCTech2020

name: Rep. Emanuel Cleaver
tweet: African-Americans are majoring and graduating in computer science, they just aren’t being hired in reasonable numbers. #CBCTech2020

name: Rep. Emanuel Cleaver
tweet: We’ve heard the excuse from some tech companies that there aren’t many African-American applicants, but that's not the case. #CBCTech2020

name: Rep. Emanuel Cleaver
tweet: There's been growth in other industries in African American employment, but strong underrepresentation in the tech industry #CBCTech2020

name: Rep. Emanuel Cleaver
tweet: Specifically, we're asking tech companies that hold sizable government contracts to develop written affirmative-action programs #CBCTech2020

name: Rep. Emanuel Cleaver
tweet: Today @RepJeffries & I sent a letter to @LaborSec Perez calling for more diversity within the technology industry. #CBCTech2020
